channel.title: Dave City
channel.description: News and updates from Dave City, the community site for Dave Madson Entertainment Inc.

item.title: davemadson's Blooper Salad 4: A Blooperful Anniversary
item.description: It's an all-star celebration of my channel's 15th anniversary, with a super-sized blooper salad, reminiscences of past videos and another miracle happening in the studio.

item.title: davemadson's PBS Bloopers 66: Blame It On the Blooper
item.description: As the PBS Blooper parade continues, craziness and randomness abounds and evil entities protesting their ban on entering Earth perform an abduction!

item.title: davemadson Update 4-1-2026
item.description: In this update, Scotty and Guy sport new looks, Harry's now Danny Donaldson, and Evil Mary poses a threat.

item.title: davemadson's Funny Signs and Errors: Got Crabs?
item.description: Daniel (BigIdeaFan) joins the cast for this insanely wacky funny sign and error session.

item.title: davemadson's LT Bloopers 285: A World of Bloopers
item.description: In the 17th season finale of LT Bloopers, Tio joins up, more randomness abounds and there's a run-in with evil logo parodies. This is also the last appearance of Daiki and Gabbie in a davemadson video for a while as Fargusno recently left the davemadson community. And since Matt Crowley has also left the davemadson community, TheXavier456 now plays Jesus.

item.title: davemadson's Blooper Salad 3: Sunburst in the House
item.description: The 1960s Westinghouse tag and the 1976-82 CPT Sunburst ID are the ingredients in this blooper salad. However, Helena and Bandita crash the feast with a not-so-very-appetizing dressing.

item.title: Welcome to Dave City
item.description: Welcome to Dave City, the new community site for Dave Madson Entertainment Inc. Here you will find the latest videos, community resources, and open source projects.

item.title: davemadson's NET Bloopers 19: If Globes Came In Bottles
item.description: The gang attempts to get the NET Globe ID right, but Lucretia, Rowena and Sylvia show up, threatening the Ash Family and seeking to avenge the carpet shampooer treatment Punxsutawney Hauldren gave the Stalker Guy and Electra Shocker.

item.title: davemadson's SEGA Bloopers 5: Stalking Up On Business
item.description: In the wildest and craziest SEGA Blooper session to date, a stalker shows up looking for Punxsutawney Hauldren.

item.title: davemadson's SG Bloopers 40: Logo Jumbo
item.description: Various logos invade the SG turf, Sam gets spooked by a scary logo and randomness abounds.

item.title: davemadson's PBS Bloopers 65: Public Birthing Service
item.description: The gang rummages through a series of 1971 PBS ID bloopers, has random moments and a run-in with the McEvils, while Katelyn gives birth to twins.

item.title: davemadson's Viacom Logo Bloopers 4: Revenge of the V
item.description: Amid the V of Doom bloopers, there is more randomness, a commercial plug, and a revenge plot. Mitch sports a retro look.

item.title: davemadson's NBC Bloopers 23: The Peacock's Centennial Jubilee: An NBC100 Logo Bloopers Special
item.description: The gang celebrates NBC's 100th anniversary with a smattering of NBC ID Bloopers and Matt is revived. So is Matt's evil twin, who, along with Sylvia, Medusa and members of the Scary Logo Alliance, crashes the party.

item.title: davemadson Shorts 34: Reformed and Renovated
item.description: The davemadson studio has a new look and Magmarina and Frederick quit Hades Palace and join up with Dave and friends, but Lucretia seeks to avenge their defection.

item.title: davemadson Shorts 33: Randomness City IX
item.description: Another spate of randomness a la Madson Lane, featuring more background issues and duplicates of characters.

item.title: davemadson's LT Bloopers 284: Bloopers Held Hostage (Part 2)
item.description: Will Sam and Anna recover and return to the studio, or will the Evil Beings possess them? This episode will tell. Judge M.L. Fairly comes out of retirement.

item.title: davemadson Shorts 32: The Ash Sisters Get Reformed
item.description: The Ash Sisters, fired from Hades Palace, join up at davemadson entertainment inc., but Rowena nearly spoils the party.

item.title: davemadson's LT Bloopers 283: Bloopers Held Hostage (Part 1)
item.description: In this LT Blooper session, Sam freaks out to the point of taking Scotty hostage, Bubblegum's evil twin shows up, and a ransom note triggers a tantrum with a shocking result.

item.title: davemadson's NBC Bloopers 22: Snakes and Stones
item.description: Bloopers on the NBC Snake ID and run-ins with Rowena, Sylvia and Medusa.

item.title: davemadson's CBS Bloopers 25: Eyes on the Prize
item.description: Amid the bloopers on the 1992 CBS ID, the gang encounters a scary logo and some troublemakers, and a surprise about the child Guy and Katelyn are expecting.

item.title: davemadson's LT Bloopers 282: Wild Shield Chase
item.description: This LT blooper session includes a chase reminiscent of "Fugitive Television" and another run-in with evil beings, one of whom is a brother of the Ash Sisters. The Angelic Society appears in full force.
